members.name: listDashboards
members.description:
GET /dashboards
Lists dashboard names

members.description:
GET /dashboard-groups
Lists the dashboard group names

members.name: listDashboardTabs
members.description:
GET /dashboards/{dashboard}/tabs
Lists the dashboard tab names

members.name: getDashboard
getDashboardGroup
members.description:
GET /dashboard-groups/{dashboard-group}
Lists the dashboard names in that group

members.name: listHeaders
members.description:
GET /dashboards/{dashboard}/tabs/{tab}/headers
Returns the headers for grid results

members.name: listRows
members.description:
GET /dashboards/{dashboard}/tabs/{tab}/rows
Returns information on grid rows, and data within those rows

members.name: listTabSummaries
members.description:
GET /dashboards/{dashboard}/tab-summaries
Returns the list of tab summaries for dashboard.

members.name: getTabSummary
members.description: GET /dashboards/{dashboard}/tab-summaries/{tab}

members.name: listDashboardSummaries
members.description: GET /dashboard-groups/{dashboard-group}/dashboard-summaries

members.name: getDashboardSummary
members.description: GET /dashboards/{dashboard}/summary

declarations.name: TestGridData
declarations.default:
new ServiceType("testgrid.api.v1.TestGridData", [
    { name: "ListDashboards", options: {}, I: ListDashboardsRequest, O: ListDashboardsResponse },
    { name: "ListDashboardGroups", options: {}, I: ListDashboardGroupsRequest, O: ListDashboardGroupsResponse },
    { name: "ListDashboardTabs", options: {}, I: ListDashboardTabsRequest, O: ListDashboardTabsResponse },
    { name: "GetDashboard", options: {}, I: GetDashboardRequest, O: GetDashboardResponse },
    { name: "GetDashboardGroup", options: {}, I: GetDashboardGroupRequest, O: GetDashboardGroupResponse },
    { name: "ListHeaders", options: {}, I: ListHeadersRequest, O: ListHeadersResponse },
    { name: "ListRows", options: {}, I: ListRowsRequest, O: ListRowsResponse },
    { name: "ListTabSummaries", options: {}, I: ListTabSummariesRequest, O: ListTabSummariesResponse },
    { name: "GetTabSummary", options: {}, I: GetTabSummaryRequest, O: GetTabSummaryResponse },
    { name: "ListDashboardSummaries", options: {}, I: ListDashboardSummariesRequest, O: ListDashboardSummariesResponse },
    { name: "GetDashboardSummary", options: {}, I: GetDashboardSummaryRequest, O: GetDashboardSummaryResponse }
])
